high_blast_rationale: C2 (Identity & Auth) governs authentication — auth is a high-blast domain (session establishment, identity persistence, session gating). Mutations here can silently bypass auth checks or produce phantom sessions.

certified_tests.high_blast_reason: C2 is the caller; CT1 carries Freelancer identity record (E1, auth data-integrity) between Identity & Auth and Data Store. Mutations to save/load path could produce phantom or partial identity records.

fault_seeds.fault: save_identity returns None (silent discard — no acknowledgement)
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ct1_shape_persists_identity_record — asserts result is not None

fault_seeds.fault: get_identity returns None after successful save (lost write)
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ct1_shape_persists_identity_record — asserts fetched is not None

fault_seeds.fault: store-unavailable exception swallowed — callback proceeds as if write succeeded
constraint-violation swallowed — duplicate identity record silently created
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ct1_failure_constraint_violation — asserts exception raised on duplicate

fault_seeds.fault: partial-failure: connection drop not caught — partial record left in store
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ct1_failure_partial_failure — asserts ACID rollback (get_identity returns None)

certified_tests.kill_strength: all 5 seeded faults killed by declared test functions

certified_tests.high_blast_reason: C2 is the provider of the session-presence signal; C6 gates all authenticated routes through this seam. Mutations here can bypass authentication entirely (silent pass-through on no-valid-session or exception).

fault_seeds.fault: check_session returns a truthy value even when no cookie is present (auth bypass)
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ct8_shape_session_presence_signal — asserts unauthenticated result when check_session returns None

fault_seeds.fault: no-valid-session: Web Ingress dispatches to domain component instead of redirecting
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ct8_failure_no_valid_session — asserts dispatched=False and redirect_location is not None

fault_seeds.fault: callee-error: exception swallowed — request dispatched to domain component
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ct8_failure_callee_error — asserts dispatched=False and redirect_location is not None

fault_seeds.fault: callee-error: exception causes 500 instead of login redirect
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ct8_failure_callee_error — asserts redirect_location is not None (login redirect, not 500)

certified_tests.kill_strength: all 4 seeded faults killed by declared test functions

certified_tests.high_blast_reason: AC5 asserts the end-to-end OAuth authentication flow — session establishment without password. Mutations here could allow unauthenticated access or accept a fabricated session token.

fault_seeds.fault: OAuth callback establishes session without verifying provider token (phantom session)
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ac5_oauth_flow_establishes_authenticated_session — asserts callback_status < 500 and session cookie set only after mock_oauth_provider.exchange_code called with real code

fault_seeds.fault: session cookie set on /auth/login before OAuth round-trip completes
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ac5_oauth_flow_establishes_authenticated_session — session cookie checked on /auth/callback response, not /auth/login

fault_seeds.fault: held-out: different provider_id silently rejected (only visible provider_id accepted)
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ac5_held_out_oauth_flow_establishes_session_different_identity — unguessable provider_id 'google-uid-heldout-9f3a7c2e' must produce a valid session

fault_seeds.fault: password form rendered at /auth/callback (auth bypass via password fallback)
fault_seeds.killed_by: test_ac5_oauth_flow_establishes_authenticated_session — no password entry required (session established via OAuth only)

certified_tests.kill_strength: all 4 seeded faults killed by declared test functions (visible + held_out combined)
